## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and data tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating content around W2 vs 1099 employment for dental hygienists, including state-specific regulations and DSO policies](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Explore programmatic content creation for hygienist salary data by location](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Plan to create a blog post featuring top Teero app reviews to address "Teero Reviews Complaints" search query](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends with 5.3% increase in traffic last week](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Topics

### W2 vs 1099 Content Strategy

  - [Historical context: Temp agencies traditionally used 1099, but W2 is becoming preferred](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Key article ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Avoiding tax headaches with W2 employment](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Legal risks of 1099 for dental practices](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [Benefits of W2 (e.g., workers' comp insurance coverage)](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Plan to create 2-3 articles (800-1000 words) on these topics](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Consider state-by-state W2 regulation article as a comprehensive resource](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### DSO-Focused Content

  - [Large DSOs (e.g., Heartland) require W2 employment due to misclassification risks](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Target content for 3,000 mid-market DSOs (10-100 locations)](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential high-value clicks from DSO decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)

### Hygienist Salary Data

  - [Average hourly rate on Teero: $70/hour](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Explore programmatic content creation for salary data by location](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Potential to outperform competitors (e.g., dentalpost.net) with more current data](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Include average temp rates vs. permanent positions (e.g., 50% premium)](https://fathom.video/share/euWBssBw_bds_6xDz6tdFz_DARunFVgq?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
